mapper.select: SELECT id, insp_no, insp_name, insp_type, org, apply_date, insp_date, inspector, result, cost, submit_status, submit_date, summary, issue, [plan] AS [plan], deleted, created_at, modified_at FROM tb_fire_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY insp_date DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, insp_no, insp_name, insp_type, org, apply_date, insp_date, inspector, result, cost, submit_status, submit_date, summary, issue, [plan] AS [plan], deleted, created_at, modified_at FROM tb_fire_inspection WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_inspection WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 AND result = #{result}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_inspection (insp_no, insp_name, insp_type, org, apply_date, insp_date, inspector, result, cost, submit_status, submit_date, summary, issue, [plan], deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{inspNo}, #{inspName}, #{inspType}, #{org}, #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{inspDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{inspector}, #{result}, #{cost}, #{submitStatus}, #{submitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{summary}, #{issue}, #{plan}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_inspection SET insp_no = #{inspNo}, insp_name = #{inspName}, insp_type = #{inspType}, org = #{org}, apply_date = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, insp_date = #{inspDate,jdbcType=DATE}, inspector = #{inspector}, result = #{result}, cost = #{cost}, submit_status = #{submitStatus}, submit_date = #{submitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, summary = #{summary}, issue = #{issue}, [plan] = #{plan}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_inspection SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
